records.question: Which methods have the nametokenized value exactly "path base<t> process" and a solutionid of at least 124409?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT method.id FROM method
WHERE method.nametokenized = 'path base<t> process' AND method.solutionid >= 124409
records.pred_sql: SELECT Id FROM Method WHERE NameTokenized = 'path base<t> process' AND SolutionId >= 124409

records.question: What methods have a nametokenized value exactly equal to character equipped table db extensions has same values, use English language, include at least one XML comment, and belong to solution IDs at most 97113?

WHERE method.commentisxml >= 1 AND method.lang = 'en' AND method.solutionid <= 97113 AND method.nametokenized = 'character equipped table db extensions has same values'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Id FROM Method WHERE NameTokenized = 'character equipped table db extensions has same values' AND Lang = 'English' AND CommentIsXml = 1 AND SolutionId <= 97113
